searchQuery.title: Search Query
searchQuery.description: Search term for podcasts (required in 'search' mode). Examples: 'technology', 'business marketing', 'health fitness'

country.title: Country Code
country.description: iTunes store country code (US, GB, CA, AU, FR, DE, ES, IT, JP)

language.title: Language (Optional)
language.description: Language filter (en, es, fr, de, it, ja, pt)

genreId.title: Genre ID (Optional)
genreId.description: iTunes genre ID for filtering. Common: Comedy (1303), News (1311), Business (1321), Technology (1318), True Crime (1488), Sports (1545), Health & Fitness (1512)

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of podcasts to return (1-200)

feedUrls.title: RSS Feed URLs
feedUrls.description: List of podcast RSS feed URLs (required in 'direct_urls' mode)

podcastIds.title: iTunes Podcast IDs
podcastIds.description: List of iTunes podcast IDs to lookup (required in 'lookup_ids' mode). Example: [1535809341, 1291409993]

includeEpisodes.title: Include Episodes
includeEpisodes.description: Extract full episode data from RSS feeds (recommended for comprehensive data)

maxEpisodesPerPodcast.title: Max Episodes Per Podcast (Optional)
maxEpisodesPerPodcast.description: Limit number of episodes to extract per podcast (leave empty for all). Useful for very large feeds.
